name: OpenNeko Official
description: First-party plugins for OpenNeko. Published by the maintainers under @open-neko/* on npm. Written, tested, and supported by the OpenNeko team.

plugins.name: @open-neko/plugin-parallel-search
plugins.title: Parallel.ai Search MCP
plugins.description: Web search + page fetch via Parallel.ai's Search MCP over Streamable HTTP. Anonymous tier supported; Bearer-token authenticated tier optional. Two actions: web_search and web_fetch.

kinds.description: Search the web via Parallel.ai's Search MCP.
Fetch a single page via Parallel.ai's Search MCP.

plugins.name: @open-neko/plugin-scalekit
plugins.title: Scalekit SSO
plugins.description: Enterprise SSO via Scalekit. One integration that fronts Okta, Entra ID, Google Workspace, JumpCloud, and other identity providers. Implements OpenNeko's generic OIDC auth contract — install this plugin and the 'Sign in with Scalekit' button lights up in the web app.

env.description: Your Scalekit environment URL, e.g. https://your-app.scalekit.com — copied from the Scalekit dashboard.
OAuth client_id from the Scalekit dashboard.
OAuth client_secret from the Scalekit dashboard. Stored in the per-user secrets file.

plugins.name: @open-neko/plugin-slack
plugins.title: Slack actions
plugins.description: Post messages, send DMs, react with emoji, and look up users/channels in Slack. Four actions, each separately approvable by operator rules. Authenticated via Slack bot token (xoxb-) stored in the per-user secrets file.

env.description: xoxb-... bot token from your Slack app. Needs scopes: chat:write, im:write, reactions:write, users:read, users:read.email, channels:read, groups:read (depending on which actions you'll allow).

kinds.description: Post a message to a Slack channel.
Send a direct message to a Slack user.
Add an emoji reaction to a Slack message.
Look up a Slack user or channel by name or ID.
